name: qianxin-tianyan-platform
description: OctoBus package for QIANXIN TianYan threat detection platform: alarm query/update, log search, asset management, vulnerability list, threat hunting, and IP whitelist management.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: list-alarms
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Query threat alarms with optional filters for level, time range, attacker/victim IP (gzip+base64 encoded), IOC, and disposition status.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: update-alarm-status
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Update the disposition status of one or more alarms: 0=unhandled, 1=handled, 6=ignored, 7=false-positive.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: search-logs
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Search raw security logs by keyword or SPL filter with time range, log index, and category.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: spl-search
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Expert SPL query mode with structured field extraction and result rows.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: list-assets
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Query asset inventory with optional filters for IP, name, group, port, and type.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: list-vulnerabilities
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: List asset vulnerabilities with optional filters for IP, name, and severity level.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: threat-hunt-search
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Build a threat relationship graph for an IOC keyword (IP, domain, URL, MD5, or email).

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: add-flow-whitelist
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Add an IP, IOC, or threat type to the flow sensor whitelist to suppress future alerts.

QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.name: get-compromised-host-status
QIANXIN_TianYan_Platform.QIANXIN_TianYan.description: Check whether a host is compromised and return its alarm count, risk score, and IOC count.
